title: Watch: IPL 2026: Vidyut Sivaramakrishnan Breaks Down RCB & SRH Squads | The Hindu IPL Podcast 2026
description: The opening match of the 2026 Indian Premier League is between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Sunrisers Hyderabad, takes place at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru on Saturday, March 28, 2026.
